title: pattern card
summary: pattern card is a core retrieval concept for Workflow Pattern Library RAG. In AIWF it should be stored with source path, task context, failure conditions, and a practical use/wrap/document/build decision when applicable.
use_when: What is the best graph pattern for auto-inpaint?
chunking_hint: Chunk by graph pattern. Preserve inputs, required custom nodes, required model assets, safety level, and failure signatures together.

title: Vol. 1 completion boundary
